## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue it addresses. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / Chore

## Testing Done

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.

- [ ] Unit tests pass locally (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] Tested in Google Colab (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested Locally

## Checklist:

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project (PEP 8, Type Hints)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have added Google-style docstrings to new functions/classes
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly (README, `docs/`)
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings

## Breaking Changes
*(If applicable, describe what breaks and how users should migrate)*
